matrixScope: Static compatibility matrix for Table View's bounded Redis command slice. This is not live Valkey runtime evidence.
detectionRules: Do not identify Valkey by redis_version alone; future runtime promotion must use server_name/valkey_version or HELLO server/version evidence.
Do not reuse Redis Runtime Happy Path smoke as Valkey evidence.
Do not expose Valkey connection UI/runtime until a local Valkey container or equivalent local-first fixture proves connect, scan, preview, command dispatch, mutation, TTL, and delete behavior.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: profile identity and static fixture inventory only
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Valkey can expose Redis-compatible identity fields for client compatibility, so redis_version is not enough to prove a Valkey runtime.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey runtime probe must record Valkey-specific server identity before any Redis-compatible behavior is promoted.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not treat a Redis-looking server identity or Redis service smoke as Valkey support.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Valkey seed selects DB 2 statically; Redis backend/smoke evidence does not count for Valkey.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for DB selection, scan pagination, or key metadata.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey smoke must prove DB 2 selection, bounded scan, key type metadata, and missing-key behavior.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not assume Redis scan/key metadata behavior is enough for Valkey.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Valkey seed contains deterministic string data only; Redis GET/SET smoke is Redis evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for string encoding, SET EX behavior, or NX/XX rejection parity.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey smoke must prove GET, SET, SET EX, visible result projection, and existing typed-control safety boundaries.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not inherit Redis string write support or SET option policy without Valkey-specific tests.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Valkey seed contains deterministic hash data only.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for hash field ordering, binary values, or hash mutation projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey smoke or focused integration must prove hash read/write projection with the same bounded UI/API contract.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not reuse Redis hash UI evidence as Valkey mutation evidence.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No live Valkey list fixture or runtime path exists.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for bounded list ranges or push result semantics.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove non-negative bounded ranges and list push projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not claim Valkey list parity from Redis allowlist coverage alone.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Valkey seed contains deterministic set data only.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for set member ordering or mutation projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove set read/write projection and visible refresh behavior.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not treat static set fixture inventory as live Valkey support.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Valkey seed contains deterministic sorted-set data only.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for scores, WITHSCORES projection, or sorted-set mutation projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove sorted-set read/write projection with score handling.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not inherit Redis sorted-set projection claims without Valkey runtime evidence.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Redis TTL smoke is wired; Valkey has no runtime TTL evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for TTL state labels, expiration timing tolerance, or exact-key PERSIST confirmation.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey smoke must prove TTL read, EXPIRE update, PERSIST exact-key confirmation, and post-mutation refresh.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not reuse Redis TTL timing or confirmation evidence for Valkey.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Valkey seed has a stable XADD id; Redis has bounded XRANGE focused evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for stream ID ordering, COUNT bounds, or stream result projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove deterministic stream seed/read behavior before stream support is claimed.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not claim Valkey stream support from static XADD inventory or Redis XRANGE tests.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Redis delete smoke proves exact-key confirmation for Redis only.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: No Table View Valkey runtime proof exists for delete confirmation, refresh behavior, or missing-key result projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey smoke must prove exact-key delete confirmation and key browser refresh.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not enable Valkey destructive command execution because Redis exact-key delete is green.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Rejected by Redis bounded command policy; Valkey support would need a separate admin/safety scope.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Valkey server-control and protocol-push behaviors are not part of Table View's KV product slice.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: separate admin/safety PR with explicit UX, confirmation policy, and Valkey runtime evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not allow admin or broad destructive commands just because a Valkey server accepts Redis-compatible command names.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Rejected by Redis bounded command policy; Valkey has no UI/runtime support for these workflows.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Valkey cluster, pub/sub, scripting, modules/functions, and consumer-group workflows require separate result envelopes, safety policy, and smoke routing.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: separate workflow-specific PR with command parser ownership, result envelope decision, and Valkey-specific smoke.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not treat protocol compatibility as support for asynchronous, scripting, module, cluster, or consumer-group workflows.

knownValkeyDeltas: Valkey identity must be proven with Valkey-specific server fields, not redis_version alone.
Redis Runtime Happy Path smoke is not Valkey runtime evidence.
Static seed/reset commands are fixture inventory only until executed against a local Valkey runtime.
Admin, broad destructive, cluster, pub/sub, modules/functions, scripting, and consumer-group workflows remain rejected even if Valkey accepts Redis-compatible command names.
unsupportedRedisAssumptions: Do not reuse Redis Runtime Happy Path smoke as Valkey evidence.
Do not enable Valkey connection UI/runtime from profile identity alone.
Do not promote a Redis command family for Valkey until that family has local Valkey runtime evidence and docs.
Do not widen Redis unsupported command families for Valkey without a separate safety and result-envelope decision.
